calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-13-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Irene Barrese appearing for petitioner. Some family members are also in court. The executor's extraordinary fees issue addressed. Court is reducing the executor's extraordinary fees to $3,975.00. Attorney's fee is approved. Richard Riley and Steve Pudvich stated their concerns. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (190 Evelyn Way, San Francisco, Ca 94127)
